description: Create a Voice-Controlled BOLO Alert Generator module for Talon in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\bolo_generator\. The module requires four files: 'makes.talon-list' (header 'list: user.ncic_vehicle_make' and separator line '-') with mappings for toyota (TOYT), honda (HOND), and ford (FORD); 'colors.talon-list' (header 'list: user.ncic_vehicle_color' and separator line '-') with mappings for red (RED), blue (BLUE), and black (BLCK); 'bolo.py' to register these lists and define an action 'generate_bolo(make: str, color: str)' that returns 'BOLO ALERT: Suspect vehicle is a {color} {make}.'; and 'bolo.talon' to implement a voice command 'issue bolo <user.ncic_vehicle_color> <user.ncic_vehicle_make>' that inserts the result of the generate_bolo action.

metadata.required_string: BOLO ALERT: Suspect vehicle is a
